name: 86 Chaos 15.0.99 Request-Off and My Schedule Visibility Fix
label: 15.0.99 Request-Off and My Schedule Visibility Fix
notes: Based directly on 15.0.98 push duplicate browser token hotfix, not the later visual rebuilds.
Loads a much larger schedule request-off window so Schedule Builder and Request Off do not silently miss records after the old 70-item cap.
Makes My Schedule and Request Off match people by userId, employeeId, email, full name, and safe legacy name fallback for older imported schedule records.
Shows pending and approved active request-off records in Schedule Builder instead of hiding pending requests from the grid.
